title: Bedrock_item
description: More powerful bedrock gear and a whole new dimension
body:
# Bedrock item is a great mod of Minecraft 1.18.2.We added a lot of powerful bedrock items.
![Bedrock item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dcec87bb031e958cd5aa74062990eff119c2f83.png)
# Installation Guide
**Our mods do not require any front mods to be installed, just that you are in Minecraft version 1.18.2 and have the forge client installed (preferably the latest version of forge).
In theory, your computer should be able to run our mods as long as it can run Minecraft smoothly (your game has more than 60 frames). However, if you are not sure about your computer, you can refer to [ our recommended configuration](https://github.com/VaporingDeer907/Bedrock-item-mod-Minecraft/wiki)**.
# The current items added to the mod are:
**Bedrock dust Ore**.**Use Netherite Pickaxe to dig**.
![Bedrock dust Ore.Destroy it and it will fall Bedrock dust](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f0b1c4a315d7f16dd8087b6572d7664fc4dab62.png)
**Bedrock dust**
![Bedrock dust](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cb887c7502c4a3e0a024e3d361dd4b81d73b5fc.png)
**Bedrock dust grain**

![Bedrock dust grain.Synthesizing it requires 9 Bedrock dust.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ab4b6708e97852ecf168183ae7c2d1a1569d9e3.png)

**Bedrock dust ingot**

![Bedrock dust ingot.Nine Bedrock dust grain can make it.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79724d264ed4c42901571d53ac6ac704ae93454d.png)

**Bedrock dust armor**

![Bedrock dust arrow.Use Bedrock dust ingot can make them.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a6fb0e799fe48c3cfa0d8b2ea15c163fde0ab3.png)

**Bedrock dust Tools**

![Bedrock dust Tool(Axe,Pickaxe,Shovel)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3238c8ecdf856a0b65ca8c8f756e5869a0e0ecf5.png)

**Bedrock dust Sword and Dense Bedrock dust Sword**
![Bedrock dust sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a27d5feec28ea80edd4636ec2ef8d7eeecb2060.png)

**They all have good attributes (such as high durability, high rank)**

# What can they change for survival?
**We highly recommend installing this mod along with other adventure and combat mods, as our items have high stats to deal with various monsters and collect various resources.During the expedition, you can use bedrock dust equipment to play without fear of encountering strong enemies.**
# Focus: Ore mining
**The equipment in the mod is very powerful, but the corresponding material acquisition difficulty will also increase. The bedrock dust ores will only refresh at Y coordinates -42 to -60, and only 1 to 4 groups of bedrock dust ores will be refreshed within each block (16x16 area), with only 1 to 4 bedrock dust ores per group.**
# On language issues
**Bedrock item is currently only available in two languages, Chinese and English (US), if you need additional languages or find a translation error, [please send feedback to VaporingDeer907](https://github.com/VaporingDeer907/Bedrock-item-mod-Minecraft/issues)**
